response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D re-debut live show of Kaela Kovalskia, including a performance of her song 'dahlah.'.

scenes.description: The video begins with a title card for '3D Redebut Live DejaVu', followed by a sequence where the character walks through a quiet, dark street, enters a building, and finds a room with a TV.
The TV turns on, displaying the song title 'dahlah.' by Kaela Kovalskia. Kaela performs the song while dancing.
